components.name: Button
components.keyInsight: Actions feel crisp and flat, with color carrying emphasis instead of elevation.

components.name: Card
components.keyInsight: Cards are low-noise containers that rely on border and tonal contrast more than depth.

components.name: Table
components.keyInsight: Tables should stay airy despite dense information, using muted text and clear row separators.

components.name: Chart
components.keyInsight: Charts bring the strongest brand color energy and should contrast against otherwise quiet surfaces.

components.name: Navigation
components.keyInsight: Navigation stays restrained, letting the active state and focused ring do the work.

components.name: Sidebar
components.keyInsight: The dedicated sidebar palette makes navigation feel like a branded workspace shell, not a generic list.

crossComponentPatterns: Use flat surfaces with thin borders before introducing elevation.
Favor bold primary color for one dominant action per region.
Support dense dashboard layouts with compact spacing and quiet muted text.
